prompt.content:
Use the HappyHospital Overview to identify which one of the two EHR Platforms covers less percentage of sites. 

For the previously identified EHR Platform, use IT Data v2, report the states for which the EHR Platform's coverage is greater than 15%. The coverage is defined as the percentage of facilities with the software used in that state. 

For each of the identified states, calculate the average turnaround time (TAT). TAT is defined as the number of days between Initiation Date & Update of Record Date. Return the state and its respective average TAT in days. Round to two decimal places and report final answers directly in console.

rubrics.name: States that "Medisoft" is the EHR Provider with less coverage (ver_42ddd38b6421434998ab27da8f2d27d4)

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Medisoft is the EHR platform that covers less percentage of sites

Medisoft has a coverage of greater than 15% in WI, MN and MO.

WI: 9.68 days
MN:	10.38 days
MO:	10.01 days
